creator: tomek@cedro.info
text: Hello world :-) I have the same issue when connecting USB 3.0 hub to 3.0 port on my desktop.. when connecting to 2.0 port it works fine. It is here since 13.0 (when I switched to a desktop). This is Unitek 7 port USB3.0 hub with external power supply using 3.0 A-B cable.
